shuttle.route: Free FIFA shuttle from Vine City MARTA Station
shuttle.hours: 4 hours before kickoff until 2 hours after final whistle

taxi_rideshare.pickup: Northside Dr NW and Andrew Young International Blvd

driving_tips: I-75/I-85 to exit 248C. Follow signs to Mercedes-Benz Stadium. Allow 45 min extra on match day.
green_tip: Taking MARTA saves approximately 4.6 kg CO2 compared to driving solo.

shuttle.route: Free FIFA shuttle from International District Station
shuttle.hours: 3 hours before kickoff until 2 hours after

taxi_rideshare.pickup: Occidental Ave S and S King St

driving_tips: I-5 to exit 163 or 164. Stadium is in the SODO district. Expect heavy traffic on match days.
green_tip: Link Light Rail saves approximately 3.8 kg CO2 per trip compared to driving solo.

shuttle.route: Free FIFA shuttle from Downtown Transit Center
shuttle.hours: 3 hours before kickoff until 2 hours after

driving_tips: US-59/I-69 to Kirby Dr exit. NRG Park has extensive parking.
green_tip: METRORail saves approximately 5.2 kg CO2 per trip vs driving solo.

bus.stop: Port Authority Bus Terminal to Meadowlands
bus.distance: Walk to stadium from bus dropoff

shuttle.route: Free FIFA shuttle from Secaucus Junction
shuttle.hours: 4 hours before kickoff until 2 hours after

taxi_rideshare.pickup: Lot L, West side of stadium

walking.note: Not practical - stadium is in Meadowlands complex, NJ

driving_tips: NJ Turnpike to exit 16W, follow signs to MetLife Stadium. Heavy traffic expected.
green_tip: NJ Transit rail saves approximately 6.1 kg CO2 per trip vs driving from NYC.

metro.line: N/A - Arlington does not have rail transit

shuttle.route: Free FIFA shuttle from Dallas DART CentrePort Station
shuttle.hours: 4 hours before kickoff until 2 hours after

taxi_rideshare.pickup: Lot D, West side of stadium

driving_tips: I-30 to Collins St or Ballpark Way. Extensive parking available.
green_tip: The FIFA shuttle from DART saves approximately 4.8 kg CO2 per trip vs driving.

shuttle.route: Free FIFA shuttle from Zócalo/Centro Histórico
shuttle.hours: 4 hours before kickoff until 2 hours after

driving_tips: Anillo Periférico to Calzada de Tlalpan. Expect heavy traffic. Arrive early.
green_tip: Metro Línea 2 saves approximately 3.5 kg CO2 per trip vs driving.
